ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Continued To Sep-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Browne for and with Scott Setrakian.

Mr. Browne addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes and stated that he will file the original bank/brokerage statements, that he will amend the caption of the petition to seek the relief sought and that he will present an explanation from the CPA regarding the Estate taxes. In addition, Mr. Browne state that he does not belived there are receipts on distribution but that he will supply them. The matter was continued to September 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
